title: Big Tech earnings test record stock market rally as AI spending takes center stage
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Big Tech earnings are crucial for sustaining the stock market rally, with AI spending significantly impacting their performance. Meta, Alphabet, Microsoft, and
excerpt: Big Tech earnings are crucial for sustaining the stock market rally, with AI spending significantly impacting their performance. Meta, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon continue to invest heavily in AI. 2026 earnings will test if this spending drives growth.

content.introduction: Big Tech earnings are crucial for sustaining the stock market rally, with AI spending significantly impacting their performance. Meta, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon continue to invest heavily in AI. 2026 earnings will test if this spending drives growth.
body: The rebound followed a weak first quarter, when investors worried that major technology firms were spending too aggressively on artificial intelligence.
Big Tech Is Spending More Than Ever on AI and It's Still Not Enough. Meta, Alphabet, Microsoft and Amazon will increase spending in 2026; 'Are
The AI boom relies heavily on four hyperscalers: Meta Platforms, Alphabet, Microsoft and Amazon.com, and their sprawling capital expenditure.
